mapper.update: UPDATE mate_approval_grant SET revoked = 1, revoked_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, note = CASE WHEN note IS NULL OR note = '' THEN '(auto-revoked on conversation delete)' ELSE CONCAT(note, ' (auto-revoked on conversation delete)') END WHERE deleted = 0 AND revoked = 0 AND grant_kind = 'UNTIL_CONVERSATION_END' AND scope_type = 'CONVERSATION' AND scope_id = #{conversationId}
